channel.title: Comments on: What’s Your Favorite Holiday Beer?
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Kyle
item.dc:creator: Kyle
item.description: Trader Joes festive ale is a knock out trappist style ale made by unibrew in canada. It will age very well a tradition among my friends
item.content:encoded:
Trader Joes festive ale is a knock out trappist style ale made by unibrew in canada.
It will age very well a tradition among my friends

item.title: By: Justin Crandall
item.dc:creator: Justin Crandall
item.description:
well, my go to... not so much holiday.. for me is sam adams hallertauer imperial pilsner. Holiday tradition for 2 years now!
I would also check out the winter classics seasonal pack they offer... Holiday porter, cranberry lambic, old fizziwig, although the cranberry lambic isn't a traditional lambic. The combo from such a large brewery is fascinating in itself!
item.content:encoded:
well, my go to… not so much holiday.. for me is sam adams hallertauer imperial pilsner. Holiday tradition for 2 years now!

I would also check out the winter classics seasonal pack they offer… Holiday porter, cranberry lambic, old fizziwig, although the cranberry lambic isn’t a traditional lambic. The combo from such a large brewery is fascinating in itself!

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: It's not an American craft beer but I definitely like Santa's Butt (http://beeradvocate.com/beer/profile/7944/20907). Sounds like of creepy though when I say it!
item.content:encoded: It’s not an American craft beer but I definitely like Santa’s Butt (http://beeradvocate.com/beer/profile/7944/20907). Sounds like of creepy though when I say it!

item.title: By: Mark
item.dc:creator: Mark
item.description: It seems way too obvious, but the wife and I always stock up on Sierra Nevada Celebration Ale between Thanksgiving and New Years.
item.content:encoded: It seems way too obvious, but the wife and I always stock up on Sierra Nevada Celebration Ale between Thanksgiving and New Years.

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Red and White is a brilliant beer no doubt about it - I will certainly be talking up that one very soon!
item.content:encoded: Red and White is a brilliant beer no doubt about it – I will certainly be talking up that one very soon!

item.title: By: Dwight
item.dc:creator: Dwight
item.description: Dogfish Head red and white. Had it last night at an event in NYC hosted by East Village Tavern and BeerMenus.com. If you get to NYC or just want to browse a fun site, check out BeerMenus.com to find great beer and beer bars and beer events. They plan to to spread to other cities early next year.
item.content:encoded: Dogfish Head red and white. Had it last night at an event in NYC hosted by East Village Tavern and BeerMenus.com. If you get to NYC or just want to browse a fun site, check out BeerMenus.com to find great beer and beer bars and beer events. They plan to to spread to other cities early next year.

item.title: By: Julie
item.dc:creator: Julie
item.description: Olfabrikken Kloster Jul: 750ml, Strong Dark Belgian (9.5% abv) with Danish sour cherries and licorice root. New from Shelton Brothers this year. Yummy!
item.content:encoded: Olfabrikken Kloster Jul: 750ml, Strong Dark Belgian (9.5% abv) with Danish sour cherries and licorice root. New from Shelton Brothers this year. Yummy!
